evidence.source_title: Why was this Iran dissident group raided in Europe?
evidence.description: The 2023 raid occurred in the context of ongoing Albania-Iran tensions, less than a year after Albania severed diplomatic relations with Iran in September 2022. Albanian authorities cited suspicion of cyberattacks as part of the raid justification.

editorial_notes: Contextual link: raid occurred against the backdrop of the 2022 diplomatic severance and ongoing Albania-Iran tensions over MEK.
